description: Stage-1 BeatDetector baseline. Phase 1 = RECORD ONLY; thresholds become hard assertions in Stage 2.

fixtures.label: clicktrack_50bpm
fixtures.formatted:
--- clicktrack_50bpm ---
  Duration       : 15.0s
  True BPM (mid) : 50.0
  BPM error      : mean=0.22 max=0.22 signed=0.22 (0.45%) [n=253]
  Beat offset    : mean=5.3ms p90=5.3ms median=5.3ms [5 matched]
  Beats          : emitted=6 GT=12 matched=5 FP=1 (4.0/min) miss=7 recall=41.7%
  Lock time      : 1.54s
  Confidence     : correct=0.244 wrong=0.000 r=0.000 [n=253]
  Octave error   : none
  Detection rate : 90.0% of state messages have tempo > 0
  Result         : FAIL (low recall 41.7% (< 50%))
